# arXiv AI Daily Digest

## Purpose
Automated tool that fetches new AI research papers from Cornell's arXiv (cs.AI category),
generates plain-English summaries using the Claude API, and saves a daily Markdown digest.

## Entry Point
src/arxiv_digest.py

## Configuration
config/settings.yaml — controls URL, model, batch size, max papers, output/log dirs

## Key Dependencies
- anthropic — Claude API client
- requests + beautifulsoup4 — arXiv scraping
- PyYAML — config loading

## Output
- output/ai_digest_YYYY-MM-DD.md — daily digest
- log/arxiv_digest_YYYY-MM-DD.log — run log

## Environment Variables
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (required)
